PQ.name: PQ
PQ.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Excluding Bank Holidays

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Fare charged is based on the time of touch in on the gate or card card validator at the origin station of the journey:

Mondays-Fridays off-peak fare not valid between 06:30 and 09:30. Valid all day Saturdays, Sundays and Bank Holidays.

You must touch in and out with a contactless payment card or contactless device.

You can also use an Oyster card with pay as you go credit, but only for travel between stations in London Zones 1-9, Bayford, Broxbourne, Chafford Hundred, Cuffley, Earlswood, Epsom, Gatwick Airport, Grays, Hertford East, Hertford North, Horley, Merstham Ockendon, Potters Bar, Purfleet, Radlett, Redhill, Rye House, Salfords, St Margarets, Ware, Watford Junction.

Charges capped at daily price cap limit, based on all journeys made on all journeys made on the same card or device between 04:30 and 04:29 the following day.
restrictions.outwardText:
Fare charged is based on the time of touch in on the gate or card card validator at the origin station of the journey:
 Mondays-Fridays off-peak fare not valid between 06:30 and 09:30. Valid all day Saturdays, Sundays and Bank Holidays.
 You must touch in and out with a contactless payment card or contactless device.
 You can also use an Oyster card with pay as you go credit, but only for travel between stations in London Zones 1-9, Bayford, Broxbourne, Chafford Hundred, Cuffley, Earlswood, Epsom, Gatwick Airport, Grays, Hertford East, Hertford North, Horley, Merstham Ockendon, Potters Bar, Purfleet, Radlett, Redhill, Rye House, Salfords, St Margarets, Ware, Watford Junction.
 Charges capped at daily price cap limit, based on all journeys made on all journeys made on the same card or device between 04:30 and 04:29 the following day.

PU.name: Chiltern Super Off-Peak (From London)
PU.notesHtml: Break of journey is not permitted on the outward journey on any day except to change trains at an intermediate station or to access station facilities.
PU.notesText: Break of journey is not permitted on the outward journey on any day except to change trains at an intermediate station or to access station facilities.
PU.seasonalVariationsHtml:
Ticket restrictions will be lifted as follows:

  • Friday 3rd to Monday 6th April 2026
  • Monday 4th May 2026
  • Monday 25th May 2026
  • Monday 31st August 2026
  • Thursday 24th December 2026 to Friday 1st January 2027

Ticket restrictions will be lifted as follows:
 Friday 3rd to Monday 6th April 2026
 Monday 4th May 2026
 Monday 25th May 2026
 Monday 31st August 2026
 Thursday 24th December 2026 to Friday 1st January 2027

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to depart London Marylebone or London Paddington after 04:29 and before 08:30, or after 16:00 and before 19:00.

Not valid on trains timed to depart Reading after 04:29 and before 09:30, or after 16:30 and before 19:00.

For journeys via London, not valid on trains timed to arrive at any London Terminal, Farringdon, or Kensington Olympia after 04:29 and before 10:00.

PV.name: Chiltern Super Off-Peak (To London)
PV.notesHtml: Break of journey is not permitted on the outward journey on any day except to change trains at an intermediate station or to access station facilities.
PV.notesText: Break of journey is not permitted on the outward journey on any day except to change trains at an intermediate station or to access station facilities.
PV.seasonalVariationsHtml:
Ticket restrictions will be lifted as follows:

  • Friday 3rd to Monday 6th April 2026
  • Monday 4th May 2026
  • Monday 25th May 2026
  • Monday 31st August 2026
  • Thursday 24th December 2026 to Friday 1st January 2027

Super Off-Peak Day Travelcards are only valid on Transport for London services from 09:30 Mondays to Fridays. They are valid at any time at weekends and on public holidays.
PV.seasonalVariationsText:
Ticket restrictions will be lifted as follows:
 Friday 3rd to Monday 6th April 2026
 Monday 4th May 2026
 Monday 25th May 2026
 Monday 31st August 2026
 Thursday 24th December 2026 to Friday 1st January 2027
 Super Off-Peak Day Travelcards are only valid on Transport for London services from 09:30 Mondays to Fridays. They are valid at any time at weekends and on public holidays.

QA.name: QA
QA.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Mondays to Fridays
QA.notesHtml:
• Restriction code WO applies to all journeys via Newbury or Didcot Parkway, not passing through Reading.
  • Restriction code Q8 applies to all journeys via Fareham / Southampton / Salisbury.
  • Restriction codes 2C /9I (restrictions listed as from/via Euston) apply from Swindon, Pewsey, Westbury and Castle Cary for travel via London Euston to destinations beyond Milton Keynes.
  • Restriction codes 7E /9J apply to all journeys via London St Pancras International.
QA.notesText:
Restriction code WO applies to all journeys via Newbury or Didcot Parkway, not passing through Reading.
 Restriction code Q8 applies to all journeys via Fareham / Southampton / Salisbury.
 Restriction codes 2C / 9I (restrictions listed as from/via Euston) apply from Swindon, Pewsey, Westbury and Castle Cary for travel via London Euston to destinations beyond Milton Keynes.
 Restriction codes 7E / 9J apply to all journeys via London St Pancras International.
